P

Felix Dyson

Person · First seen 3302-01-04 · 2 mentions
Active: 3302-01-04 → 3302-05-17
Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3302-05-17
Freelance Report Puritanical Organisation Targets Traders
An extremist temperance organisation from Eravate begins interdicting and destroying traders delivering legal intoxicants to Skvortsov Orbital for the Distant Worlds Expedition celebration. The Diamond Frogs vow to protect delivery pilots.
3302-01-04
Diamond Frogs Contribute to Christmas Initiative
The Diamond Frogs private military contractors completed Operation: Mistle Toad, delivering 250,000 tonnes of personal gifts to the Santa Muerte system. Commander Doot contributed 704 tonnes in an Imperial Cutter. Event organizers also offered new Pilots Federation members a Faulcon DeLacey Viper Mk IV and cash rewards up to 100 million credits for top contributors.
